subcodes.title: Tafsir-i-Suratu'l-Kawthar (Commentary on the Surah of Kawthar)
subcodes.first_line: Praised be to God, who hath made the Ornament of the scriptural Tablets to be the Book of the Daybreak which is operative within everything such that it is cleft asunder and split apart
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الرحمن الرحیم و به نستعین. الحمد لله الذی جعل طراز الواح کتاب الفلق فی کل ما فتق و استفرق و استنطق طراز الازل
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @prophecy and fulfillment, @station of the Manifestation of God
